nodes.label: AI as code generation assistant
nodes.grounding_span: write one-use scripts that process a large amount of data with semi-variable formatting

nodes.label: AI for documentation efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: supplement official API and library documentation

nodes.label: AI bug severity and fix effort
nodes.grounding_span: If a bug is extremely minor such as an off-by-one or moderate such as not formatting the outputted data properly, I will handle that

nodes.label: AI as drafting assistant for emails
nodes.grounding_span: my email account has an AI that could write emails. However, I prefer to handle them myself

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner vs delegator
nodes.grounding_span: At the beginning, I tend to delegate complete tasks to it. ... Otherwise, I tend to collaborate with the AI throughout the task

nodes.label: AI effectiveness for unit test generation
nodes.grounding_span: AI was able to write a suite of unit tests for me

nodes.label: AI as debugging assistant
nodes.grounding_span: I consistently experienced a segmentation fault ... I did spend at least 2 of those hours trying to use an AI to find the issue. It didn't help

nodes.label: AI use sanctioned by workplace
nodes.grounding_span: My workplace emphasizes AI use heavily

nodes.label: AI impact on skill maintenance
nodes.label_negative: Skill atrophy due to AI reliance
nodes.grounding_span: I have to maintain those skills since AI is not yet capable of taking over

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: that was still a lot faster than I could have otherwise managed

nodes.label: Control and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to retain control over such important tasks

nodes.label: Skill preservation and professional adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: I have to maintain those skills

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for unit testing
nodes.grounding_span: I remember feeling particularly satisfied when an AI was able to write a suite of unit tests for me

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for debugging
nodes.grounding_span: It didn't help, or even provide useful trains of thought

nodes.label: Preference for human-written emails
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to handle them myself

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: If their competency increases noticeably, then I foresee integrating them into my job far more extensively

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with diminishing returns awareness
nodes.grounding_span: If the bug would require more than generally 15 minutes to manually fix, I will try another prompt

nodes.label: Critical evaluation and selective acceptance of AI output
nodes.grounding_span: I'm always curious to see what it provides and whether it will serve as a good foundation
